title: epipactis helleborine subsp. phyllanthes
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. phyllanthes, commonly known as Phyllanthes helleborine, is a rare orchid species found in Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthes helleborine include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a herbal remedy.
